'''âl-h-r''' ('''kalahar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unabsolve|unabsolve]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-h-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unabsolve|unabsolve]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-h-r
|-
! Lemma
| kalahar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilahar|thilahar]] || [[word:jilahar|jilahar]] || [[word:shilahar|shilahar]] || [[word:kilahar|kilahar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulahar|thuthulahar]] || [[word:jujulahar|jujulahar]] || [[word:shushulahar|shushulahar]] || [[word:kukulahar|kukulahar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulahar|thulahar]] || [[word:julahar|julahar]] || [[word:shulahar|shulahar]] || [[word:kulahar|kulahar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulahar|thulahar]] || [[word:julahar|julahar]] || [[word:shulahar|shulahar]] || [[word:kulahar|kulahar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelahar|thelahar]] || [[word:jelahar|jelahar]] || [[word:shelahar|shelahar]] || [[word:kelahar|kelahar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholahar|thotholahar]] || [[word:jojolahar|jojolahar]] || [[word:shosholahar|shosholahar]] || [[word:kokolahar|kokolahar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholahar|tholahar]] || [[word:jolahar|jolahar]] || [[word:sholahar|sholahar]] || [[word:kolahar|kolahar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholahar|tholahar]] || [[word:jolahar|jolahar]] || [[word:sholahar|sholahar]] || [[word:kolahar|kolahar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlahar|thĂŠlahar]] || [[word:jĂŠlahar|jĂŠlahar]] || [[word:shĂŠlahar|shĂŠlahar]] || [[word:kĂŠlahar|kĂŠlahar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalahar|thathalahar]] || [[word:jajalahar|jajalahar]] || [[word:shashalahar|shashalahar]] || [[word:kakalahar|kakalahar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalahar|thalahar]] || [[word:jalahar|jalahar]] || [[word:shalahar|shalahar]] || [[word:kalahar|kalahar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalahar|thalahar]] || [[word:jalahar|jalahar]] || [[word:shalahar|shalahar]] || [[word:kalahar|kalahar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalahar|shalahar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalahar|goshalahar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalahar|gokishalahar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalaharnĂŒ|shalaharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalaharnknĂŒ|goshalaharnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalaharnĂŒ|gokishalaharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalaharshĂ«|shalaharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalaharnkshĂ«|goshalaharnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalaharshĂ«|gokishalaharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalaharo|shalaharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalaharnkro|goshalaharnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalaharo|gokishalaharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalaharmu|shalaharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalaharnkmu|goshalaharnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalaharmu|gokishalaharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalaharsher|shalaharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalaharnksher|goshalaharnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalaharsher|gokishalaharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalaharng|shalaharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalaharnkng|goshalaharnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalaharng|gokishalaharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalaharya|shalaharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalaharnkya|goshalaharnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalaharya|gokishalaharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalaharyam|shalaharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalaharnkyam|goshalaharnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalaharyam|gokishalaharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalaharnĂŒshĂ«|shalaharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalaharnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalaharnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalaharnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalaharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalaharnĂŒro|shalaharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalaharnknĂŒro|goshalaharnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalaharnĂŒro|gokishalaharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalaharnĂŒmu|shalaharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalaharnknĂŒmu|goshalaharnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalaharnĂŒmu|gokishalaharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalaharshĂ«nĂŒ|shalaharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalaharnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalaharnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalaharshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalaharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalaharshĂ«ro|shalaharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalaharnkshĂ«ro|goshalaharnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalaharshĂ«ro|gokishalaharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalaharshĂ«mu|shalaharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalaharnkshĂ«mu|goshalaharnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalaharshĂ«mu|gokishalaharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalaharonĂŒ|shalaharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalaharnkronĂŒ|goshalaharnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalaharonĂŒ|gokishalaharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalaharoshĂ«|shalaharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalaharnkroshĂ«|goshalaharnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalaharoshĂ«|gokishalaharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalaharomu|shalaharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalaharnkromu|goshalaharnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalaharomu|gokishalaharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalaharmunĂŒ|shalaharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalaharnkmunĂŒ|goshalaharnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalaharmunĂŒ|gokishalaharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalaharmushĂ«|shalaharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalaharnkmushĂ«|goshalaharnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalaharmushĂ«|gokishalaharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalaharmuro|shalaharmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalaharnkmuro|goshalaharnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalaharmuro|gokishalaharmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
